name: writer_app
label: Writer
subtitle: LaTeX manuscript editor with PDF preview and verifiable claims
about: Edit, compile, and verify scientific manuscripts. File tree, CodeMirror LaTeX editor, PDF preview via pdf.js, one-click compile for manuscript/supplementary/revision, bibliography browser, and claim-chain visualization via scitex-clew.
description: SciTeX Writer is a browser-based LaTeX editor for scitex-writer projects. It compiles manuscripts, supplementary materials, and revisions with tracked changes; manages bibliography files; and renders verifiable claims (\vclaim) with clickable provenance chains back to the source session.
author: ywatanabe
capabilities: Edit LaTeX manuscripts with syntax highlighting
Verifiable claims with Clew verification chains
